name: Failed/Rescheduled Rate by Area
query:
SELECT
    COALESCE(addr.pincode, 'Unknown') AS "Pincode:Data:120",
    COALESCE(addr.city, 'Unknown') AS "City:Data:150",
    COUNT(ds.name) AS "Total Stops:Int:120",
    SUM(CASE WHEN ds.status IN ('Failed', 'Rescheduled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Failed/Rescheduled:Int:180",
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN ds.status IN ('Failed', 'Rescheduled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(ds.name),
        2
    ) AS failure_rate
FROM
    `tabDelivery Stop` ds
LEFT JOIN
    `tabAddress` addr ON addr.name = ds.address
WHERE
    ds.docstatus < 2
GROUP BY
    addr.pincode, addr.city
ORDER BY
    failure_rate DESC
LIMIT 50
